existing_features.title: Create a frontend form to input new financial records with fields for date, description, amount, and category selection (income or expense)
Display all financial records in a sortable table showing date, description, amount, category, and a delete action
Calculate and display total income, total expenses, and net balance based on all recorded transactions

Design a clean, professional interface with a cohesive visual theme using warm earth tones (terracotta, sage green, cream) with clear typography and organized card-based layouts that convey financial clarity and trust

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a backend data model to store financial records with fields for date, description, amount, category (income/expense), and unique identifier
Implement backend functions to add new financial records, retrieve all records, and delete records by ID
